description:
## Parent

bsm-7en

## What to build

Rename the existing summary-oriented Issue List contract to the canonical Issue contract while preserving the current list-loading behavior. The app should continue to load and render the Issue List from the Current Workspace, but the data contract should now carry the fields needed by Issue Detail: always-present description, comments, comment author, and closeReason.

This is the prefactor that makes later Issue Detail slices operate on one Beadwork Issue model rather than adding a separate detail RPC or durable model.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Existing `IssueSummary` / `list_issue_summaries` naming is replaced with `Issue` / `list_issues` across code, generated bindings, tests, and relevant docs touched by this slice.
- [ ] `bw list --all --json` remains the only Beadwork read used for the Issue List.
- [ ] The normalized Issue contract includes always-present `description`, `comments`, comment `author`, and `closeReason` fields with empty defaults when Beadwork omits or nulls them.
- [ ] Existing list-loading states still behave as before: loading, success with Issues, empty with workspace path, and typed failure.
- [ ] Adapter, RPC, Effect, and compact Issue List view-model tests are preserved/renamed and extended for the expanded Issue contract.

## Blocked by

None - can start immediately
title: Rename issue list contract to Issue
